title: Nucleus Software International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Nucleus Software International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
